title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 508.180 - Clerk to file and docket cause when transmitted
text:
508.180.  Clerk to file and docket cause when transmitted. — The clerk of the court to which such cause is certified shall file the same, and the cause shall be docketed, proceeded in and determined as if it had originated therein.
(RSMo 1939 § 1066, A. 1949 H.B. 2118) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 915; 1919 § 1365; 1909 § 1935
